<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Run Vitest Coverage And JUnit<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Run Vitest with coverage, GitHub Actions output, dot output, and a JUnit report.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                       | Description                                | Required | Default                                                                                                                           |
|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------|----------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `command`                  | Vitest command to execute.                 | `false`  | `npx vitest run --coverage --reporter=github-actions --reporter=dot --reporter=junit --outputFile=test-report.junit.xml --silent` |
| `ci`                       | CI environment value.                      | `false`  | `true`                                                                                                                            |
| `max-threads`              | MAX_THREADS value for constrained CI runs. | `false`  | `1`                                                                                                                               |
| `hanging-process-reporter` | Enable Vitest hanging process reporters.   | `false`  | `true`                                                                                                                            |
| `coverage-path`            | Expected LCOV output path.                 | `false`  | `coverage/lcov.info`                                                                                                              |
| `junit-path`               | Expected JUnit report path.                | `false`  | `test-report.junit.xml`                                                                                                           |
| `working-directory`        | Directory where Vitest runs.               | `false`  | `.`                                                                                                                               |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name            | Description                 |
|-----------------|-----------------------------|
| `coverage_path` | Expected LCOV output path.  |
| `junit_path`    | Expected JUnit report path. |
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/run-vitest-coverage-junit" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Run tests with coverage and JUnit report"
   id: "vitest"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/run-vitest-coverage-junit@main"
```

<!--/usage-->
